# Nilesh Raj - AI/ML Engineer & GenAI Developer

## Profile
Nilesh Raj is an AI/ML Engineer specializing in Agentic AI, RAG pipelines, and Full-Stack AI development. 
He builds enterprise-grade, production-ready AI automation systems using Python, LangGraph, FastAPI, and React.

## Core Projects
1. OmniCrew AI: An autonomous multi-agent RPA platform for sovereign web data extraction.
2. LumanGuide: An enterprise Agentic RAG system with LangGraph orchestration and LLMOps observability.

## Skills
Python, LangChain, LangGraph, FastAPI, Docker, AWS, FAISS, RAG, SQL, PineCone, VectorDatabases.
